seo.title: JKT48Connect for Fan Projects — Affordable JKT48 Data API
seo.description: JKT48Connect gives fan project builders access to JKT48 data without the scraping headache. Member profiles, live streams, theater schedules, and events. Free tier available, starts at Rp 49.000/month.

hero.heading: Build your JKT48 fan project faster
hero.subheading: Get clean JKT48 data without building scrapers. Member profiles, live streams, theater schedules, events, and news — all from a single API. Free tier to get started, Pro from Rp 49.000/month.

problem.title: Why building JKT48 fan projects takes so long
problem.intro: Most fan developers spend more time fighting data sources than building the actual app they envisioned.

items.title: Scrapers take weeks to build
items.description: Parsing the JKT48 website, handling session cookies, normalizing inconsistent HTML — you spend weeks on data infrastructure before writing a single line of your actual app.

items.title: Scrapers break constantly
items.description: Every time JKT48 updates their site design, your scraper breaks. You become a maintenance engineer instead of a fan app developer.

items.title: Data quality is unpredictable
items.description: Scraped data often has encoding issues, missing fields, and inconsistent formatting. You spend hours cleaning data that should just work.

items.title: Starting from scratch every time
items.description: Every new fan project idea requires building the same data layer again. Member list, live stream tracking, theater schedule — rebuilt from scratch each time.

features.title: Everything you need to build a complete JKT48 fan app
features.intro: JKT48Connect covers all the data types a fan project needs — so you can skip the infrastructure and go straight to building features.

items.title: Member profiles
items.description: Full profiles for all active and graduated members — name, generation, birthday, photo, social links, and streaming platform IDs. Always up-to-date.

items.title: Live stream tracking
items.description: Real-time IDN Live, Showroom, and YouTube (JKT48V) stream data. Viewer counts, stream duration, and member info in one response.

items.title: Theater schedules
items.description: Upcoming show schedules with team info, setlist names, senbatsu members, and ticket status. Never maintain a manual show schedule again.

items.title: Events & announcements
items.description: Handshake events, concerts, off-air shows, and special appearances — structured and queryable. Build event calendars and reminder features with real data.

items.title: News API
items.description: Official JKT48 news and announcements with full HTML content and images. Build a news feed without scraping the official site.

items.title: Birthday API
items.description: Upcoming birthdays, birthday countdowns, and age data — ready to power birthday reminder apps and fan celebration tools.

items.title: TypeScript SDK
items.description: Install via npm, add your API key, and start building. Full type safety, autocomplete, and documented response types from day one.

items.title: Webhook support
items.description: Get notified when a member goes live, an event is announced, or new news is published. Build event-driven apps without polling. Available on Pro.

items.title: Historical data
items.description: Recent live stream history, past theater shows, and news archives — not just current data. Build activity pages and analytics features with real history.

benefits.title: Why fan project builders choose JKT48Connect
benefits.intro: Stop fighting data infrastructure. Start building the fan app you actually want to build.

items.title: Ship in days, not weeks
items.description: Skip the scraping setup entirely. Install the SDK, add your API key, and your first fan app feature is live in hours — not after weeks of data infrastructure work.

items.title: Never fix a broken scraper again
items.description: JKT48Connect maintains the data layer. When JKT48's site updates, we handle it — you keep building without interruption.

items.title: Affordable from the start
items.description: Free tier for getting started. Pro at Rp 49.000/month (≈ $3) for fan projects that need more. No surprise costs as your project grows.

items.title: Reuse data across every project
items.description: The same API key and member IDs work across all your fan apps. Build your second, third, and fourth fan project in a fraction of the time.

items.title: Apply for free extended access
items.description: Non-commercial fan projects can apply to the JKT48Connect Developer Program for extended free access. Build for the community without worrying about API costs.

items.title: Clean data you can trust
items.description: Normalized schemas, consistent member IDs, proper date formats. No encoding issues, no missing fields, no cleaning raw HTML.

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.intro: Common questions from fan project builders evaluating JKT48Connect.

items.question: How much does JKT48Connect cost for a small fan project?
items.answer: The free tier gives you 1.000 API calls/month with no credit card required — enough to prototype and test your project. The Pro plan is Rp 49.000/month (≈ $3) for 100.000 calls. Most small fan projects run comfortably on the free tier or Pro.

items.question: I've never used an API before — can I still use JKT48Connect?
items.answer: Yes. The TypeScript SDK is designed to be beginner-friendly — install via npm, add your API key, and call functions like getMembers() or getLiveStreams(). Full documentation and code examples are at jkt48connect.com/docs.

items.question: Is there a free option for fan projects?
items.answer: Yes, two options. The free tier gives you 1.000 API calls/month with no credit card required. Non-commercial fan projects can also apply to the Developer Program for 50.000 calls/month free — see jkt48connect.com/open-source for eligibility.

items.question: Can I use JKT48Connect for a Discord bot?
items.answer: Yes. Discord bots are one of the most common JKT48Connect use cases. Use the Members API, live stream endpoints, and webhooks to build bots that announce when members go live, post birthday messages, and share theater schedules.

items.question: What if I only need one type of data, like birthday reminders?
items.answer: You can use only the endpoints you need — there's no requirement to use the full API. Call just the Birthday API and ignore everything else. API call limits apply to your total usage across all endpoints.

items.question: How do I get started quickly?
items.answer: Register at jkt48connect.com to get a free API key. Install the TypeScript SDK with npm install jkt48connect-sdk. Follow the quickstart guide at jkt48connect.com/docs/quickstart and you'll have your first API response in under 5 minutes.

items.question: Can I use JKT48Connect in a mobile app?
items.answer: Yes. The REST API works from any environment — web, mobile, or desktop. For React Native projects, use the TypeScript SDK. For native iOS or Android, call the REST endpoints directly from Swift or Kotlin.

items.question: What happens if I exceed my monthly API call limit?
items.answer: We notify you as you approach your limit. Calls over the limit are rate-limited rather than hard-blocked — your app won't crash. We give you time to upgrade your plan before enforcing strict limits.

articles.title: Why not to scrape JKT48 data
